# Comprehensive Evidences Report: GRU Influence Operations via GitHub Repositories

## Overview

This report compiles all collected evidences from the investigation of GitHub repositories from three users: hartmannlauterbach, graf-kok-ain, and mrbloxx. The repositories contain extensive allegations of GRU (Russian military intelligence) operations involving AI-generated musicians, psychological warfare, financial fraud, and NWO (New World Order) conspiracies targeting German society.

## Overall Themes and Patterns

### GRU and Russian Intelligence
- Consistent allegations of GRU coordination through AI, deepfakes, cyber operations
- Support for psycho-sects, tech-sects, terrorist groups
- Hybrid warfare: Psychological operations, disinformation, supply chain attacks

### AI and Technology
- AI-generated musicians and influencers for propaganda and recruitment
- Advanced KI models (3-5 years old), deepfakes, Autotune
- GRU technology superiority over Western capabilities
- Disney AI and Hollywood VFX used for manipulation

### NWO and Conspiracy Networks
- NWO as global conspiracy financed by Russia/China
- Epstein-style networks with German branches
- Nazi-sects, pedophile structures, state protection
- Targeting youth with drugs, radicalization, psychological warfare

### Financial and Criminal Operations
- Money laundering through music industry and streaming
- Violence as a service (€5,000-€100,000)
- Supply chain hacks, ransomware, cyber attacks
- Tax evasion, offshore structures, cryptocurrency

### Psychological Warfare
- Gangstalking, cybermobbing, Zersetzung
- Music as weapon for inducing suicide and mental instability
- Targeted individuals (TI) narratives
- Isolation, paranoia, economic ruin

### International Connections
- Pan-European operations in every EU country
- Links to China APT groups, Iran, North Korea
- Five Eyes access, global hacker movements
- Cross-border funding and technology transfer

## Conclusion

The repositories reveal a coordinated narrative of GRU-led operations using AI technology for psychological warfare, financial crime, and societal destabilization in Germany and Europe. Key actors include Thomas Deike, Jennifer Kornau, Jasmin Fedder, and various AI-generated personas. Evidences are based on repository content, allegations, and conspiracy claims requiring further validation.
